---
title: "Clase 4: Programación Orientada a Objetos"
# embed-resources: true
---

{{< downloadthis ../../notebooks/clase_04.ipynb dname=clase_04 label="Descargar Jupyter Notebook" icon=journal-code type=default class=data-button id=clase_04 >}}

<!-- <iframe
  src="https://jupyterlite.github.io/demo/notebooks/?path=python.ipynb"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  style="border: 1px solid #ddd;">
</iframe> -->
